candidate_problem_record.subject: Physics
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: In tests of a 120-g, two-stage model rocket engine, the force produced by the engine was graphed during a 15-second burn as shown above. This engine is installed in an 80-g model rocket and the rocket is fired vertically from rest. Assuming that aerodynamic forces of drag and lift on the rocket are negligible, complete the following questions. Determine the elapsed time between takeoff and when it arrives back to its launch pad.
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。

metadata.question_zh: 在测试 120-G 两级型号火箭发动机时,发动机产生的推力在 15 秒的燃烧过程中被绘制如图所示。该发动机安装在质量为 80 克的火箭上,火箭从静止状态垂直发射。假设火箭上的空气动力学阻力可忽略不计,请确定火箭从起飞到回到发射台所经历的时间。(最终答案为一个数值)
metadata.explanation_zh:
上升到峰顶的时间为17秒。从峰顶到地面的自由落体时间可以使用恒加速运动的运动学方程计算:

$$x = \frac{1}{2}gt^2$$

其中$x$是位移(1015米),$g$是重力加速度(10米/秒^2),而$t$是自由落体时间。

重新整理方程,我们得到:

$$t = \sqrt{\frac{2x}{g}} = \sqrt{\frac{2(1015米)}{10米/秒^2}} \approx 14秒$$

因此,往返的总时间是到达峰顶的时间(17秒)和从峰顶自由落体的时间(14秒)之和,即17秒+14秒=31秒。

sample_understanding_summary.rationale: The sample clearly asks for a numeric elapsed-time answer and requires the force-vs-time graph, which is readable enough to extract the thrust stages. However, the text mentions a 15-second burn while the plotted thrust appears to end around 6 seconds, so the pair is understandable but has a noticeable inconsistency.

conflict_pairs.detail: 题目依赖图像，但题干中视觉锚点表达较弱。
